Banded Trunk Rotation Exercises 2/2
STEPPING - Extended Hip/Extended Knee STOPPING - Hip hinge/flexed knee
band resistance2-3 sets x 10m▪Separate knees to obtain triple extension (as if stretching band between knees)
combinations2-3 sets x 15mProject hips away by separating knees apart laterally
this drill & similar combinations2-3 sets x 15mProject hips away by separating knees apart laterally
▪Project hips away by pushing ground away
▪Separate knees to obtain triple extension (as if stretching band between knees)Preparation for lateral running & stepping
